title: Delete custom recipe via API
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there any API that can let us delete our custom recipe in the board by passing in WebhookId programmatically? 
Br, YarHuoy

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there any API that can let us delete our custom recipe in the board by passing in WebhookId programmatically?

Br, YarHuoy

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @yarhuoy

Unfortunately there is no API support for deleting / editing or adding integration custom recipes. You can delete the webhook which will at least stops monday from triggering your app’s endpoint.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Ignore this – was answered already by Bas
